name: Indian Carrot Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Wheat sprouts or cooked wheat berries
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together corn oil and lime juice in a large bowl.
2. Whisk in ground cumin, cinnamon, salt, and minced garlic.
3. Stir in the sliced carrots. Cover and refrigerate until chilled.
4. Serve chilled, garnished with wheat sprouts.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGES
CHO: 10g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 2g; CAL: 61; Low-sodium diets: This recipe is suitable.
